scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @iso-ocr/api & npm run dev:worker --workspace @iso-ocr/api & npm run dev --workspace @iso-ocr/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @iso-ocr/shared && npm run build --workspace @iso-ocr/api && npm run build --workspace @iso-ocr/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @iso-ocr/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @iso-ocr/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @iso-ocr/web
